1.0 is represented as 0x00010000.

java.awt.font/TextLayout/getVisibleAdvan.name: getVisibleAdvance
java.awt.font/TextLayout/getVisibleAdvan.description:
Returns the advance of thisTextLayout, minus trailing
whitespace.

java.awt.font/GlyphVector/getVisualBound.name: getVisualBounds
java.awt.font/GlyphVector/getVisualBound.description: Returns the visual bounds of thisGlyphVectorThe visual bounds is the bounding box of the outline of thisGlyphVector.

java.awt.font/TextLayout/getVisualOtherH.name: getVisualOtherHit
